_metadata.notes: This visa is for individuals who want to join or stay with family members who are settled in the UK (spouse, partner, parent, or child).

relationship.description: Must be married to or in a genuine subsisting relationship with a UK settled person
relationship.details: You must be married to, in a civil partnership with, or have been living together with your partner for at least 2 years.

sponsor_status.description: Sponsor must be a British citizen, settled person, or have refugee/humanitarian protection
sponsor_status.details: Your partner must be a British citizen, have ILR/EU Settled Status, or have refugee/humanitarian protection.

financial.description: Must meet minimum income requirement (£18,600 annually, higher with children)
financial.details: Your sponsor (or combined income) must be at least £18,600/year, or £22,400/year with one child, plus £2,400 for each additional child.

accommodation.description: Must have adequate accommodation without recourse to public funds
accommodation.details: You must have adequate accommodation that is owned or occupied exclusively by your family and does not contravene overcrowding rules.

english_language.description: Must meet English language requirement at CEFR A1 (initial) / A2 (extension)
english_language.details: You must demonstrate English language proficiency at CEFR A1 level for initial application, A2 for extension, and B1 for settlement.

genuine_relationship.description: Must intend to live together permanently in the UK
genuine_relationship.details: You and your partner must intend to live together permanently in the UK.

financial_calculations.description: Cash savings above £16,000 held for 6 months can be used to meet the financial requirement. Savings are divided by 2.5 to calculate annual income equivalent.

age_exemptions.over_65: Applicants aged 65 or over are exempt

english_exemptions.disability_exemption: Applicants with a physical or mental condition that prevents them from meeting the requirement

settlement.description: After 5 years on a Family visa (2.5 years initial + 2.5 years extension), you may be eligible to apply for Indefinite Leave to Remain (ILR).
